  • Uses of DocumentReader in org.springframework.ai.reader

    Classes in org.springframework.ai.reader that implement DocumentReader
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonReader
    A class that reads JSON documents and converts them into a list of Document objects.
    class 
    TextReader
    A DocumentReader that reads text from a Resource.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsoupDocumentReader
    Reads HTML documents and extracts text content using JSoup.

  • Uses of DocumentReader in org.springframework.ai.reader.markdown

    Classes in org.springframework.ai.reader.markdown that implement DocumentReader
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MarkdownDocumentReader
    Reads the given Markdown resource and groups headers, paragraphs, or text divided by horizontal lines (depending on the MarkdownDocumentReaderConfig.horizontalRuleCreateDocument configuration) into Documents.

  • Uses of DocumentReader in org.springframework.ai.reader.tika

    Classes in org.springframework.ai.reader.tika that implement DocumentReader
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TikaDocumentReader
    A document reader that leverages Apache Tika to extract text from a variety of document formats, such as PDF, DOC/DOCX, PPT/PPTX, and HTML.
